plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to minimize risk.
Trim SPY to reduce concentration below 25%.
Add QQQI to increase income exposure.
Trim CRWD to reduce tech concentration.
Buy NVDU as a high-quality setup.
Hold remaining cash for safety.
conservative.read: This plan aims for capital preservation with a target of ~1.5% monthly return. It prioritizes reducing risk through lower leverage and concentration, accepting slower growth for stability.

plan: Trim SOXL to a minimal allocation.
Sell SPAL to remove high-beta exposure.
Trim SPY to reduce concentration to 25%.
Add QQQI for income generation.
Add CRWD to increase quality tech exposure.
Buy NVDU as a strong setup, balancing risk and reward.
balanced.read: This balanced approach targets ~2.5% monthly return by blending growth and risk reduction. It trims leverage and concentration while adding quality names and income, aiming for steady growth with controlled drawdowns.

plan: Add to SOXL to leverage semiconductor strength.
Trim SPY to reduce broad index concentration.
Trim QQQI to prioritize growth over income.
Add CRWD to increase high-conviction tech.
Buy NVDU as a strong growth opportunity.
Buy SPXS to add inverse leverage for diversification.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly return by embracing leverage and concentration in high-scoring setups. Expect higher potential gains but also significantly larger drawdowns due to increased leverage and daily rebalancing of leveraged ETFs.

plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs to eliminate risk.
Sell CRWD to reduce high-beta tech exposure.
Add to SPY for broad market exposure.
Maximize QQQI for steady monthly income.
Buy CVX for its dividend yield.
Hold remaining cash for stability.
income.read: This income-focused plan targets ~1% monthly return through distributions and capital preservation. It prioritizes stable income-generating assets like QQQI and SPY, minimizing volatility and high-beta exposure.
